headline: Mastercard and JPMorgan dividends fuel this fund’s outsized 6.2% payout
summary: Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust (NYSE:GDV) trades at roughly $29 and pays a $0.15 monthly distribution, which annualizes to about 6.2% on the share price. For income investors comparing that against a 10-year Treasury yielding around 4.3%, the premium looks appealing. But whether that income is safe depends on understanding what GDV actually is and ... headline: Why Income Investors Love GAB’s Dividend (And Why They Shouldn’t)
